name: terminal-screenshot
description: > Render a terminal CLI program's colored output to a PNG so Claude can actually SEE the real visual result — color contrast, alignment, background blocks, highlighting — instead of only reading plain text and raw ANSI escape codes. Use this whenever verifying or debugging how a CLI tool looks in the terminal: delta git diff colors, bat syntax highlighting, starship prompt, eza/ls colors, git diff, ripgrep matches, or any ANSI-colored output. ALWAYS use it right after changing any CLI color conf
author: daymade
